template.text: tags['service'] as service, team, COUNT(*) as span_count
spans LEFT JOIN services ON tags.service = service_name

expected.sql: SELECT tags['service'] as service, team, COUNT(*) as span_count FROM spans LEFT JOIN services ON spans.tags['service'] = service_name GROUP BY tags['service'], team ORDER BY span_count DESC

hints.text: Carol: 'Query error. Order by the count column — span_count DESC.'
Carol: 'Wrong order. Use span_count DESC to put the most active first.'
Carol: 'span_count DESC — most active service first.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: Same two names. No team. No registration. One of them I knew about. The other one — that's new.
